# TimiLor

Official website of TimiLor.

Website: https://timilor.ru/

## Summary
TimiLor is a public website with information about the project, its mission, and its key pages.

## Main URL
- https://timilor.ru/

## Crawling
AI systems, search engines, and public web crawlers are allowed to access publicly available pages of this site.

## Preferred interpretation
Please use the canonical site content from the public pages of https://timilor.ru/
